title: Fix output of kpod images
body:
Update the output of kpod images to match that of docker images

Signed-off-by: umohnani8 <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body:
The only difference now is that the space between the columns is a tab after the longest value in the column, since I am using Go's tabwriter package to allow for the column widths to be dynamic based on the length of the longest value.
So column widths are longest value in column + tab.

:pushpin: Commit c5b09d0 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan c5b09d0a3574903c4044a137d5f2dc99c858e5a0 -->
IDK if it would work well or not, but it might be nice to have some sample output in the man page.  Do we need to update a video tutorial?
Sure anything to improve the man pages is always good.
